results.Query: Add new node with name new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_81 type EK_PACKET_SWITCH, to ju1.a2.m2. Return a graph.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-1, add
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    
    # Create a copy of the graph to avoid modifying the original
    graph_copy = nx.DiGraph.incoming_graph_data(graph_data) if nx.is_directed(graph_data) else nx.Graph(graph_data)
    graph_copy = nx.node_link_graph(graph_copy)  
    
    # Find the parent chassis node 'ju1.a2.m2' of type EK_CHASSIS
    parent_node = None
    for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True):
        if node[1].get('type') == 'CHASSIS' and node[1].get('name') == 'ju1.a2.m2':
            parent_node = node[0]
            break

    # Add the new EK_PACKET_SWITCH node
    if parent_node:
        graph_copy.add_node(
            'new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_81', 
            name='new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_81', 
            type=['EK_PACKET_SWITCH']
        )
        graph_copy.add_edge(parent_node, 'new_EK_PACKET_SWITCH_81', type='RK_CONTAINS')

    # Prepare the output
    return_object = {
        'type': 'graph',
        'data': nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy),
        'updated_graph': nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    }

    return return_object
